diagnosis.final_diagnosis: s/p vfib arrest due to metabolic acidosis, HFrEF, moderate mitral regurgitation, NSTEMI, Staph epi bacteremia, Enterococcus UTI, Acute on chronic renal failure, Lactic acidosis, transaminitis, anemia, atrial fibrillation
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient's cardiac arrest was attributed to metabolic acidosis, linked to kidney dysfunction. Laboratory results indicated significant acidosis and kidney function deterioration, which led to the conclusion that the acidic environment caused the cardiac event.
